default.description: ABERP Tauri allow-list per ADR-0007 §Tauri allow-list. NO fs::all, NO shell::open, NO shell::execute. The `aberp serve` subprocess is launched from the Rust setup hook via std::process — it does not require a Tauri capability and is not reachable from the SPA. Permissions enumerated below are the minimum the SPA needs to call our own #[tauri::command] handlers; we do NOT pull in `core:default` because that bundles surfaces (e.g. clipboard, webview) PR-9-2 has no use for. New capabilities are added in subsequent PRs only when the SPA actually needs them.
